metadata.description_en: The eastern terminus of the Shinkansen network, beneath the red-brick Marunouchi station front and the towers of the capital.
metadata.art_theme: dense capital city core, red-brick palace-front station, glass towers, imperial moat greenery

metadata.description_en: Tokyo's southern gateway, an office-tower district laced with old Tokaido post-town lanes and bay canals.
metadata.art_theme: modern office tower rows beside bay canals, hints of an old post town

metadata.description_en: Business district of Japan's second city; the harbor skyline of Minato Mirai rises beyond the arena and the ramen museum.
landmarks_en: Minato Mirai ferris wheel and Landmark Tower
metadata.art_theme: harbor city skyline with giant ferris wheel and sail-shaped tower in the distance

metadata.description_en: Castle town on Sagami Bay where the line meets the sea, gateway to the Hakone hot-spring mountains.
metadata.art_theme: white castle keep above a coastal town, fishing harbor, forested mountains behind

metadata.description_en: A hot-spring resort stacked on steep slopes over the sea; steam drifts between retro ryokan terraces.
metadata.art_theme: steep seaside onsen town, terraced retro resort hotels, steam wisps, blue bay

metadata.description_en: Spring-water town at the foot of Mount Fuji, crossed by crystal streams from the mountain's snowmelt.
metadata.art_theme: clear spring streams through a small shrine town, Mount Fuji huge on the horizon

metadata.description_en: The classic Fuji panorama stop: paper-mill chimneys and tea fields under the full cone of the mountain.
metadata.art_theme: Mount Fuji towering over tea fields and a small industrial mill town

metadata.description_en: Prefectural capital ringed by Japan's largest tea hills, built around the moats of Sunpu Castle park.
metadata.art_theme: castle-moat park in a mid-size city surrounded by rolling tea plantations

metadata.description_en: A small castle town among tea terraces, rebuilt around one of Japan's few wooden castle keeps.
metadata.art_theme: small wooden castle keep over a quiet town wrapped in tea terraces

metadata.description_en: City of pianos and motorcycles on the shore of Lake Hamana, its eel farms glinting between sandbars.
landmarks_en: Act City tower shaped like a harmonica
metadata.art_theme: industrial-creative city by a wide lagoon lake, tall slender tower, eel farm rafts

metadata.description_en: A harbor city where vintage streetcars still ring through the streets below Yoshida Castle's corner turret.
metadata.art_theme: retro streetcars in a riverside town with a small castle turret

metadata.description_en: Flat farm country at the edge of the automotive belt — rice paddies meeting factory roofs.
metadata.art_theme: geometric rice paddies beside clean modern factories, a dutch-style windmill park

metadata.description_en: Industrial heart of central Japan; golden dolphins crown the castle north of the twin station towers.
metadata.art_theme: broad industrial metropolis, green-roofed castle with golden dolphins, twin cylindrical towers

metadata.description_en: A quiet stop in the Nobi plain rice fields, with Gifu Castle visible on its mountain far to the north.
metadata.art_theme: wide rice plain with levee rivers, a tiny castle silhouette on a far mountain

metadata.description_en: Junction town between snowy Mount Ibuki and the reed shores of Lake Biwa, Japan's largest lake.
metadata.art_theme: rail junction between a vast lake and a snow-capped mountain

metadata.description_en: The thousand-year capital: To-ji's pagoda rises beside the line as temple roofs ripple toward the eastern hills.
metadata.art_theme: ancient capital of wooden temples, five-storey pagoda by the tracks, tiled machiya rows, forested hills

metadata.description_en: Where Tokaido meets San'yō: the merchant metropolis of canals, Osaka Castle and the neon south.
landmarks_en: Osaka Castle on its stone ramparts
metadata.art_theme: big merchant metropolis, white-and-gold castle on massive stone walls, canal districts

metadata.description_en: Pinned between the Rokko mountains and the port, with the Nunobiki waterfall hidden directly behind the platforms.
metadata.art_theme: port city squeezed between green mountains and sea, red lattice port tower, waterfall gorge

metadata.description_en: Suburban stop by the Akashi strait, where the world's longest suspension bridge leaps to Awaji Island.
metadata.art_theme: colossal suspension bridge over a strait, small coastal suburb, fishing boats

metadata.description_en: The white heron castle — Japan's most perfect keep — floats above the dead-straight castle avenue from the station.
metadata.art_theme: brilliant white multi-tiered castle dominating a straight boulevard town

metadata.description_en: A shipyard town folded into a deep Inland Sea inlet, cranes leaning over still water.
metadata.art_theme: quiet deep bay with shipyard cranes and terraced houses

metadata.description_en: Sunny gateway to Shikoku, home of the black crow castle and Korakuen, one of Japan's three great gardens.
metadata.art_theme: black castle keep over a classic strolling garden with streams and lawns

metadata.description_en: Stop for Kurashiki's Bikan quarter: white-walled storehouses mirrored in a willow-lined canal.
metadata.art_theme: white earthen storehouses with black tile along a willow canal

metadata.description_en: The castle stands so close its moat almost touches the platforms; a city of roses and steelworks.
metadata.art_theme: castle keep immediately beside shinkansen platforms, rose gardens, steel port haze

metadata.description_en: Hillside temple town tumbling to the Inland Sea, famous for slope alleys, cats and the island-hopping cycling road.
metadata.art_theme: temple-dotted hillside town cascading to an island-studded sea

metadata.description_en: A ferry port wedged between castle stones and the sea — the station sits on the old castle foundations.
landmarks_en: Mihara Castle foundations under the station
metadata.art_theme: small port town built into old castle stone walls, ferries among islands

metadata.description_en: The sake capital Saijō: rows of white brewery walls and red-brick chimneys among university hills.
metadata.art_theme: sake brewery quarter with brick chimneys and white storehouse walls

metadata.description_en: Delta city of rivers and peace: the A-Bomb Dome and Peace Park at its heart, the floating torii across the bay.
landmarks_en: Atomic Bomb Dome and Peace Park
metadata.art_theme: river-delta city of bridges, domed memorial ruin in a green park, great red torii in the bay beyond

metadata.description_en: Mountain stop for the Kintai-kyō — five wooden arches leaping the Nishiki river below a ropeway castle.
metadata.art_theme: five-arched wooden bridge over a clear river, tiny castle on the ridge

metadata.description_en: A petrochemical bay whose silver towers and pipes glitter against the Inland Sea — famous for its night factory views.
metadata.art_theme: gleaming petrochemical plant towers and pipes along a calm industrial bay

metadata.description_en: Gateway to the 'Kyoto of the west': Rurikō-ji's pagoda and steaming Yuda onsen lie up the valley.
metadata.art_theme: rural junction with a heritage steam locomotive, pagoda valley and onsen steam

metadata.description_en: The quietest stop on the San'yō line: a rice-farming town with a single folk-tale statue on its plaza.
metadata.art_theme: sleepy rice-farming valley town, limestone karst hills on the horizon

metadata.description_en: Honshu's last stop, above the Kanmon strait whirlpools and the pufferfish markets of Shimonoseki.
metadata.art_theme: great strait bridge between two shores, vermilion shrine, fish market harbor

metadata.description_en: Kyushu's northern gate: the castle sits in a moat garden ringed by monorail viaducts and steel-town energy.
metadata.art_theme: castle in a moat garden surrounded by a lively industrial city and monorail

metadata.description_en: The western terminus in Fukuoka: canal-side shopping palaces, bayside towers and yatai food stalls steaming at dusk.
metadata.art_theme: bright southern port metropolis, canal mall terraces, slender seaside tower, street food stalls
